emails.subject: Northwestern
emails.body: Northwestern Kathleen, We need to set up an LLC for the Blue Dog turbines. Chris had proposed some names at some point, then Ben had come up with something. I now can't remember what it is. Anyway, it needs to be on the list for next week. Thanks, Kay

emails.subject: Northwestern
emails.body: Northwestern Hi KC, It would be a big help if you could take the NorthWestern guaranty sig pages to Marissa after D Duran has signed them. Thanks, Kay

emails.subject: RE: NorthWestern
emails.body: RE: NorthWestern Ok. One question...I have a draft of the "Written Consent of Manager of Montana Megawatts I, LLC" prepared by Marisa. One of the resolutions was the election of officers (not directors) of the company. Is the document making Ben a director in the closing documents? Anyway, I'll prepare his resignation, I was just wondering if he was an officer too. Kathleen

emails.subject: RE: NorthWestern
emails.body: The closing docs are on top of my cabinet, near my name plate. Help yourself. Thanks, Kay

emails.subject: Re: FW: NorthWestern
emails.body: Re: FW: NorthWestern Where are you? I'm on 6. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: FW: NorthWestern
emails.body: RE: FW: NorthWestern I'm on 5, by the windows. Come on down! I'll look for you. To: Carnahan, Kathleen

emails.subject: RE: FW: NorthWestern
emails.body: RE: FW: NorthWestern I thought you were on 6. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: FW: NorthWestern
emails.body: nope, I'm on 5 To: Carnahan, Kathleen

emails.subject: FW: NorthWestern
emails.body: FW: NorthWestern I do have another doc for Dave to sign, but I don't think it is critical that it be signed today.
